occupation_definition: Conduct recreation activities with groups in public, private, or volunteer agencies or recreation facilities. Organize and promote activities, such as arts and crafts, sports, games, music, dramatics, social recreation, camping, and hobbies, taking into account the needs and interests of individual members.

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Other Personal Care and Service Workers

siblings.occupation_title: Exercise Trainers and Group Fitness Instructors
